name: california-san-bernardino
description: San Bernardino County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: San Bernardino County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past San Bernardino County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('San Bernardino County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: San Bernardino County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract San Bernardino County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-san-bernardino-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-san-bernardino-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page contains a navigation menu listing 5 specific districts (First through Fifth) with distinct external URLs (e.g., /about-bos, /bosd1.sbcounty.gov) indicating a multi-record listing structure.
Representative data is likely located in a main content container (e.g., #main, #content) or within a grid/table structure not fully visible in the truncated HTML.
Photo URLs are expected to be relative paths (e.g., /wp-content/uploads/...) requiring absolutization to the base URL https://main.sbcounty.gov/.
The 'Board of Supervisors' menu item (id='menu-item-469') confirms the context for extracting 'representatives' data.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for San Bernardino County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: San Bernardino County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for San Bernardino County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: San Bernardino County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
